* **照顧者負荷問卷回應範例**

## Example QuestionnaireResponse: 照顧者負荷問卷回應範例

Profile: [照顧管理評估量表－主要照顧者負荷問卷回覆](StructureDefinition-LTCQuestionnaireResponseCMSCaregiverLoad.md)

* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ltc-questionnaire-response-caregiver-load-example
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): Questionnaire:[LTCQuestionnaireCaregiverLoad](Questionnaire-ltc-questionnaire-caregiver-load.md)
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)J01
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 睡眠受到干擾
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): false
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)J02
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 體力上的負荷
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): true
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)J03
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 需分配時間照顧其他家人
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): false
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)J04
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 對個案的行為感到困擾
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): false
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)J05
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 無法承受照顧壓力
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): false
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](data:image/png;base64,) Documentation for this format

    "linkId" : "J02",

      "valueBoolean" : true

  },

    "linkId" : "J03",
    "text" : "需分配時間照顧其他家人",
    "answer" : [{
      "valueBoolean" : false
    }]
  },

      "valueBoolean" : false

  },

    "linkId" : "J05",
